---
title: "01. 定义、公设与合法构造"
subtitle: "Definitions, Postulates, and Admissible Constructions"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 1
categories: [elements, cultural, omega]
description: "How Euclid turns geometry into a constrained construction grammar built from primitive objects and licensed moves."
---

**Books:** Book I, III, IV  
**Omega Directions:** `fold operator`, `modular tower inverse limit`, `rate-distortion information theory`

{{< include articles/category_01_definitions_postulates_and_admissible_constructions.md >}}

---

[Back to Elements Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
